title: Bottom row: V, B, M, C
description: Reach down to bottom row — V, B (index), M (right index), C (left middle)
text: vibe move come back voice mind black many simple yes you can do
finger_focus: Bottom row reaches: V/B (index), C (left middle), M (right index)

tips.text: Index fingers reach down: V (left) and B (left), N (right) — already learned, M (right)
C sits below D — left middle drops

tips.target: vibe move come back voice mind

tips.text: Common letters now possible: vibe, come, voice, mind, black, many

tips.target: black many simple yes you can do

character_tips.anna: Bottom row is harder — you reach down. Return to home after each press.
character_tips.maxim: Bottom row gives you four new letters. English starts to sound real.
character_tips.knopych: Deep dive! V, B, M, C — bottom row! 🌊
character_tips.klavochka: Wonderful! Now you know almost the whole keyboard! 🌟
